arts.ttl: FPL notes: Pedro benched, Palmer poor + another Chelsea injury
arts.sum: Scout Notes from Brighton 3-0 Chelsea The post FPL notes: Pedro benched, Palmer poor + another Chelsea injury appeared first on Best FPL Tips, Advice, Team News, Picks, and Statistics from Fantasy Football Scout.

arts.ttl: Brighton 3-0 Chelsea: Player Ratings From a Nightmare Night for the Blues
arts.sum: Chelsea were uncompetitive against Brighton and could be overtaken by Manchester City, Newcastle United and Bournemouth in the Premier League standings.

Enzo Maresca admitted Chelsea’s woeful showing at Brighton was their worst performance since he took over as boss. They were beaten 3-0 at the Amex Stadium – six days after the Seagulls knocked them out of the FA Cup there. The result was a blow to Chelsea’s hopes of finishing in the top four. “We […] The post Maresca annoyed after Chelsea’s ‘worst performance’ appeared first on West London Sport.

arts.ttl: Papers: Atletico Madrid plot summer move for Chelsea striker Jackson
arts.sum: The top stories and transfer rumours from Saturday's newspapers...

arts.ttl: £1.5bn spent & no striker in sight - how did Chelsea get here?
arts.sum: A thumping 3-0 loss and no shots on target - how, after more than £1.5bn spent, have Chelsea ended up with no centre-forward?

arts.ttl: Gary Neville slams Chelsea star with 'bad habit' who got 'BULLIED' by Brighton in dire 3-0 defeat
arts.sum: Gary Neville stuck the knife into Chelsea after their dismal 3-0 defeat by Brighton on Friday night. The Blues' grip on a top-four place in the Premier League loosened with a third defeat in four games.

arts.ttl: Jamie Carragher questions whether Chelsea can keep Cole Palmer happy if they miss out on Champions League spot after dismal defeat at Brighton
arts.sum: Palmer, 22, cut a frustrated figure as his side were defeated by the Seagulls for the second time in six days following their FA Cup loss to the same opponents last Saturday.

arts.ttl: Will 'worst performance' under Maresca test Palmer patience at Chelsea?
arts.sum: Enzo Maresca says the 3-0 defeat to Brighton was Chelsea's "worst performance" under him, as Jamie Carragher questioned how long Cole Palmer will wait around for the team to improve.

arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca criticises Chelsea after witnessing ‘worst performance’ of tenure
arts.sum: The Blues suffered another heavy defeat at Brighton thanks to Kaoru Mitoma’s eye-catching opener and Yankuba Minteh’s double.

arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca labels Chelsea's display against Brighton 'the worst' during his seven-month tenure - as Gary Neville and Jamie Carragher slam the Blues after crushing 3-0 defeat
arts.sum: Enzo Maresca has labelled Chelsea 's performance against Brighton on Friday night as 'the worst' of his time as the Blues boss.
